value.found_quote: Introducing Operator ... A research preview of an agent that can use its own browser to perform tasks for you. Available to Pro users in the U.S.
value.rationale: The page introduces OpenAI's Operator, an agent that uses its own browser to perform tasks. A July 17, 2025 update states Operator is now fully integrated into ChatGPT as ChatGPT agent, and the standalone Operator site will sunset, indicating it has been merged into ChatGPT agent.
